futures.title: Synthetic Relationship Engine
futures.likelihood: If the weekly relationship rhythm remains inconsistent, growth will continue to depend on owner memory and fresh effort. If the rhythm is installed, the same trusted network can compound more predictably.

theOneMove.summary: This fictional lab profile has credible relationship strength, uneven follow-up discipline, and a clear opportunity to convert personal trust into a repeatable operating system.
theOneMove.the_move: Run one 90-day relationship operating rhythm: segment the synthetic database, assign every active relationship a next action, and inspect the scorecard each Friday.
